privileged_info_summary: The implement_webview_js_bridge task is a synthetic Android development task that requires integrating a WebView with JavaScript bridge functionality into a HelpCenterApp project. All metadata claims are verified correct: the project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/HelpCenterApp; the MainActivity is at app/src/main/java/com/example/helpcenterapp/MainActivity.kt; the layout is at app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml; the asset HTML file is at app/src/main/assets/help_center.html. The JavaScript interface must be named "AndroidHelp" with a "submitTicket" method, both of which are correctly referenced in the embedded help_center.html file that calls window.AndroidHelp.submitTicket(). The project uses real, current Android development tools: Android Gradle plugin 8.2.0 (Nov 2023), Kotlin 1.9.0 (July 2023), compileSdk 34 (Android 14), minSdk 24, and real AndroidX libraries (androidx.core:core-ktx:1.12.0, androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.6.1, com.google.android.material:material:1.11.0, androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout:2.1.4). The task is generated synthetically from templates in setup_task.sh with no external data sources.
